text: I feel a sense of curious anticipation in this modern space, immersed in an environment dedicated to reflection and innovation. The clean lines and glass-walled room suggest transparency and openness, while the bold R+D exhibit, with its abstract visuals and thought-provoking texts, calls me to contemplate the boundaries of knowledge and creativity. I am both a witness and a participant—my presence here beckons me to listen, to think, and to wonder how human ingenuity shapes our shared future.
